name: Farmers Edge Precision Agriculture API
what_it_does: Farmers Edge precision agriculture REST API for farm data management, digital agronomy, and crop analytics. Enables AI agents to manage field data and soil sampling integration for precision agriculture workflow, handle weather station and micro-climate data for site-specific agronomic decision support, access variable rate prescription generation for precision input application, retrieve yield mapping and crop performance analytics for agronomic benchmarking, manage satellite imagery and vegetation index monitoring for crop stress detection, handle scouting report and agronomist recommendation integration for precision advisory workflow, access carbon credit program data and sustainability reporting for regenerative agriculture, retrieve agronomic AI recommendation and decision support for crop planning automation, manage multi-field and farm-level analytics for enterprise agricultural portfolio management, and integrate Farmers Edge with farm equipment, agronomic retailers, and crop insurance platforms.
use_cases: Generating VR prescriptions from precision agronomy agents
Monitoring crop conditions from satellite imagery agents
Analyzing yield data from crop performance agents
Supporting carbon credits from sustainability agents
not_for: Non-commercial farming without precision technology adoption
Specialty crops without field-scale production focus
Livestock operations without crop production component
best_when: A commercial grain farmer, agronomic retailer, or crop insurance provider working with Farmers Edge wanting AI agents to automate precision prescription generation, satellite crop monitoring, yield analytics, and carbon program documentation.
avoid_when: FARMER DATA PRIVACY AND OWNERSHIP: Farm data belongs to farmers per AFBF Privacy Principles; automated data sharing with third parties (crop insurers, lenders, input suppliers) requires explicit written farmer consent; unauthorized data sharing creates farm data privacy violation. Carbon credit program accuracy — automated carbon credit program data used for carbon offset claims must meet program verification standards (CAR, Verra, ACR); automated carbon data with reporting errors creates carbon credit integrity and fraud risk. Crop insurance integration — automated yield and field data integrated with crop insurance must accurately represent actual crop performance; automated data manipulation or selective reporting creates crop insurance fraud risk. Variable rate prescription safety — automated VR prescription generation for restricted-use pesticides must verify certified applicator eligibility and label compliance; automated applications outside label parameters create EPA and state pesticide law violation.

auth.notes: Farmers Edge uses OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Winnipeg, Manitoba HQ. Founded 2005. Public (TSX: FDGE, went public 2021). Precision agriculture and digital agronomy. 25M+ acres monitored. Weather station network (3,000+ stations). Carbon program integration. Competes with Climate FieldView (Bayer), Granular (Corteva), and Conservis for precision agriculture data. Mitsui & Co. investment (2019).

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-acre annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-acre annual subscription; agronomic services packages
pricing.notes: Winnipeg, Manitoba. TSX: FDGE. Founded 2005. Public company. 25M+ acres. Weather station network. Carbon programs. Mitsui-backed.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; satellite imagery delivery is async

known_agent_gotchas: FARMER DATA CONSENT FOR THIRD-PARTY SHARING: Automated data sharing with crop insurers, lenders, or input suppliers requires explicit farmer written consent per AFBF Privacy Principles; unauthorized automated sharing creates farm data trust violation and potential legal liability

Carbon credit data integrity — automated carbon program documentation must meet program standard verification requirements (CAR, ACR, Verra); automated reporting with data gaps or inaccuracies creates carbon credit invalidation and fraud risk
No webhooks — satellite imagery delivery and prescription generation events require polling; implement periodic polling rather than expecting push notifications
TSX public company financial stability — Farmers Edge went public on TSX (2021) and has faced financial challenges; verify current product roadmap and API stability given company financial position

Satellite imagery async delivery — satellite-based crop monitoring imagery has async delivery dependent on satellite pass schedule and cloud cover; automated crop monitoring workflows must handle variable imagery delivery timing and cloud cover gaps

Weather station data gaps — Farmers Edge weather station network coverage varies by region; automated site-specific weather data workflows must implement interpolation or fallback for locations far from nearest station
agent_readiness.security_notes: Precision agriculture. SOC2. OAuth2. CA/US. Farm field and agronomic data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Precision agriculture. SOC2. OAuth2. CA/US. Farm and agronomic data.
